DataRequest.Name: Windows: Renamed Binary / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects the execution of a renamed binary often used by attackers or malware leveraging new Sysmon OriginalFileName datapoint. This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/process_creation/win_renamed_binary.yml

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process" AND srcFileName IN ("7z.exe","certutil.exe","cmd.exe","cmstp.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","msiexec.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","netsh.exe","powershell.exe","powershell_ise.exe","psexec.c","psexec.exe","regsvr32.exe","rundll32.exe","wevtutil.exe","winrar.exe","wmic.exe","wscript.exe") AND (procName NOT REGEXP ".*\\\\7z\\.exe|.*\\\\certutil\\.exe|.*\\\\cmd\\.exe|.*\\\\cmstp\\.exe|.*\\\\cscript\\.exe|.*\\\\mshta\\.exe|.*\\\\msiexec\\.exe|.*\\\\net1\\.exe|.*\\\\net\\.exe|.*\\\\netsh\\.exe|.*\\\\powershell\\.exe|.*\\\\powershell_ise\\.exe|.*\\\\psexec64\\.exe|.*\\\\psexec\\.exe|.*\\\\regsvr32\\.exe|.*\\\\rundll32\\.exe|.*\\\\wevtutil\\.exe|.*\\\\winrar\\.exe|.*\\\\WMIC\\.exe|.*\\\\wscript\\.exe")
